summary: Comprehensive testing of AdminUser360New.js page at /admin/user360. All features working correctly: Search, Browse Mode, User Profile Card, Stats Row, Admin Actions (9 buttons), 6 Data Tabs, Admin Notes, and all modals (Reset PIN, Change Role, Adjust Balance, Change Referral, Subscription Management, Delete User, Edit Profile, Auto Diagnosis).

minor.issue: Console shows 401 and 404 errors during page load - likely related to auth token refresh or missing endpoints, but doesn't affect functionality

issues: Sidebar link 'User 360° View' points to /admin/user-360 (old page) instead of /admin/user360 (new page). Users need to navigate directly to /admin/user360 to access the new page.

action_items: Update sidebar link in AdminLayout.js to point to /admin/user360 instead of /admin/user-360 for the new User 360 page
critical_code_review_comments: AdminUser360New.js (~1100 lines): Well-structured component with all required features implemented
Search functionality works with email, UID, mobile, PAN, Aadhaar
Browse Mode shows user list with filters (Role, Plan, KYC) and pagination
User Profile Card displays: name, UID, role, email, mobile, date, referral code, KYC status, mining status, subscription plan, PRC balance
Stats Row shows: Total Mined, Total Redeemed, Referral Bonus, Total Referrals, Risk Score (calculated dynamically)
Admin Actions panel has 9 buttons: Block, Resume/Pause Mining, Reset PIN, Change Role, Adjust Balance, Change Referral, Subscription, Diagnose, Delete User
All 6 data tabs working: Transactions, Redemptions, Referrals, Sub History, Logins, KYC Data
Edit Profile modal has comprehensive form with Personal Info, Contact Info, Address, KYC Documents, Bank Details, Nominee sections
Auto Diagnosis shows Health Score and issues with Re-run capability
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminUser360New.js page at /admin/user360 fully tested. All features working: Search, Browse Mode with filters, User Profile Card, Stats Row with Risk Score, Admin Actions (9 buttons), 6 Data Tabs, Admin Notes, Edit Profile modal, Subscription Management modal, Auto Diagnosis. Note: Sidebar still links to old page /admin/user-360.

features_tested.user_profile_card: PASS - displays name, email, plan, balance, KYC status, role, UID, mobile, date, referral code, mining status, expiry
features_tested.stats_row: PASS - Total Mined, Total Redeemed, Referral Bonus, Total Referrals, Risk Score all displayed
features_tested.admin_actions_panel: PASS - 9 buttons: Block, Resume Mining, Reset PIN, Change Role, Adjust Balance, Change Referral, Subscription, Diagnose, Delete User
features_tested.browse_mode: PASS - shows user list with filters (Role, Plan, KYC), search, pagination, View buttons
features_tested.block_unblock_button: PASS - Block button visible for non-blocked user
features_tested.mining_toggle_button: PASS - Resume Mining button visible for paused mining
features_tested.reset_pin_modal: PASS - opens with Generate New PIN button
features_tested.change_role_modal: PASS - shows User, Sub Admin, Admin options
features_tested.adjust_balance_modal: PASS - shows current balance, Add/Deduct toggle, amount input, reason field
features_tested.change_referral_modal: PASS - shows input for new referrer UID with 'remove' option
features_tested.subscription_modal: PASS - shows current plan, plan options (Explorer/Startup/Growth/Elite), duration options, free subscription toggle
features_tested.diagnose_feature: PASS - Auto Diagnosis Report shows Health Score 100/100, Issues Found 0, Re-run button
features_tested.delete_user_modal: PASS - shows warning message and Delete Permanently button
features_tested.edit_profile_modal: PASS - comprehensive form with Personal Info, Contact Info, Address, KYC Documents, Bank Details sections
features_tested.tabs_kyc_data: PASS - shows PAN, Aadhaar, Bank Account, UPI ID
